Video.summary: Do you ever wish you could see all the wackiest weather from around the world, without moving a muscle or lifting a finger? Your wish is our command here on a brand new episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow
Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow
Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow

Video.summary: Float through a flood, battle a blizzard, and twist around in a tornado on Extreme Weather Countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade

Video.summary: Welcome to Extreme Weather Countdown, where floods, blizzards, and lightning are the name of the game.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind

Video.summary: We have a brand new lineup bursting at the seams with some of the craziest climate events caught on camera.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In
Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In
Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In

Video.summary: From the intense to the unusual to the just plain wacky, Extreme Weather Countdown is home to everything the elements have to offer, and it's time for an all-new episode. We'll work our way through snow, wind, fog, lightning, and more, so fasten your seatbelts and let's get started.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain
Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain
Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain

Video.summary: Things heat up with sweltering heat waves, then cool down with icy blizzards on Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Timber!

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Timber!
Extreme Weather Countdown | Timber!
Extreme Weather Countdown | Timber!

Video.summary: Eyelashes freeze, dogs swim in the street, and more of the unexpected on this Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Lost in the Clouds

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Lost in the Clouds
Extreme Weather Countdown | Lost in the Clouds
Extreme Weather Countdown | Lost in the Clouds

Video.summary: Today, cruise ships tilt, houses succumb to blizzards, and wind stops people in their tracks.

Video.summary: Today’s forecast: thunder, lightning, and high winds. Oh, and lots of tornadoes.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?

Video.summary: Every weather event you can imagine is making it impossible for people- and cars- to stay on their feet!

Video.summary: The countdown has begun as we prepare for some of the most extreme weather caught on camera!

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here

Video.summary: Thunderstorms come out to play with powerful booms, brilliant flashes, and enough force to take down trees!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Speed of Lightning

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Speed of Lightning
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Speed of Lightning
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Speed of Lightning

Video.summary: From Florida's shores to Australia's outback, we traveled the world to collect videos that will blow you away.

Video.summary: Tornadoes twist at sea, hail pounds the Earth, and trees topple over on today’s Extreme Weather Countdown!

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble
Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble
Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble

Video.summary: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let’s get ready to ride!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats

Video.summary: You’re in for some wild, wild weather today as tumbleweeds, snow, and lightning all pile up!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected
Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected
Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected

Video.summary: Record setting snowfall, tidal waves, rainfall, and flooding all make history in this noteworthy countdown.

Video.summary: Rainstorms cause mudslides, landslides, floods, and more on this wet episode of Extreme Weather Countdown
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain, Rain, Go Away!

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain, Rain, Go Away!
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain, Rain, Go Away!
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain, Rain, Go Away!

Video.summary: Are you ready to have dust devils, tornadoes, floods, and thunderstorms flashing before your eyes? You'd better be, because you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown, where we waste no time filling your screen with the most intense weather events caught on camera.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather
Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather
Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather

Video.summary: Who will win in a match of Parachuting Ice Climber and Skier Colliding with Chair Lift?
